docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
JUDGMENT CREDITORS'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANTON, LYNDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TANTON, LYNDA AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0713325D001, TAG # 031603 BY DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED NOV-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-11-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED ON 11/09/12 TO DEFENDANT YEOWNSAE KANG, "VACANT/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANTON, LYNDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT AND TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S INCORRECT NAME FROM "YEOWNSAE KANG" TO "YEOUNJAE KANG". FILED BY DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, *(JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT THRU COURT)* AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KANG, YEOUNJAE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAR-11-2013 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER DONALD S. MITCHELL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
